title: Update preact to version 7.1.0 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [preact](https://www.npmjs.com/package/preact) just published its new version 7.1.0.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency preact
New version 7.1.0
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of preact. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 43 commits . - [`4a4c930`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/4a4c930c4c6fae58a96028370886ae4296313299) 7.1.0 - [`a5d3544`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/a5d3544aebef64e44230c4803f4f1e10d3d7c3e1) Slim down a little bit! - [`8f321f5`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/8f321f5689c992577beb5b51303e574cfb3a58e0) Merge branch 'gnaeus-master' - [`e502802`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/e502802f1fa9d81df0eda07c67943bdcae10dc56) Merge branch 'master' of https://github.com/gnaeus/preact into gnaeus-master - [`edea0ac`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/edea0acaefa6295a7538e0d406418a3e9a1267cd) Merge branch 'master' of github.com:developit/preact - [`9ebda55`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/9ebda55b9b4635ce2810697b1b61241cb25dddb2) Add a whole bunch of explanatory comments to the diff engine 🎉 - [`dc469b1`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/dc469b1ec257a030a7618613ef6b73c82bae7665) Fixed signature for linkState (#427) - [`b2fbdb7`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/b2fbdb78729dfb59498e2374f37425f86271eed2) Merge branch 'beta' - [`4629453`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/46294535173ead5de524043bfdfedac8c3cbbcfb) Re-add short-circuit for PFC's (fixes compositional PFC triggering constant recycling) - [`26cee93`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/26cee93bbad4eb6a68e110c50458c06aa04e9ac6) Run remote tests only when pushing to master (#426) - [`499e211`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/499e2118913bd4348d84a179278c2eb3c7c4d443) Add test coverage reporting with coveralls (#421) - [`32eec79`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/32eec7912eee90513ad5e38687a8da2a46ab5372) Remove `removeOrphanedChildren()` in favor of two inline `lastChild` loops. - [`67d74ea`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/67d74eaed58cc92667817280287982aeed015307) Check existence of firstChild before checking if it is a Text node. - [`6a862d3`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/6a862d3a1df402bb682a197491b31b0334b91403) Fix diff reflow when removing leading element. Fixes #394 - [`3adbe8c`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/3adbe8c90efee2aad2940762a5f7e96915044757) Fix edge case when swapping component root. Fixes #414. There are 43 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/developit/preact/compare/284e4aa3e7bed8e4e7c6911a5a4f0b8f0f154763...4a4c930c4c6fae58a96028370886ae4296313299). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
